Hero.description: Flick generates a short code your contact enters to download. No account required.

Features.instantBody: Drop your files and get a code in seconds.
Features.receiveBody: Enter the code shared by your contact to download.
Features.expirationBody: Set a lifetime: 1h, 24h, 7 days or custom.
Features.protectionBody: Add a password to secure access to your files.

Send.title: Send files
Send.description: Drop your files and configure sharing options.
Send.filesSelected: {count, plural, =1 {# file selected} other {# files selected}}
Send.messagePlaceholder: Add a note for the recipient…

SendSuccess.title: Your code is ready
SendSuccess.description: Share this code (or the link) with your recipient.
SendSuccess.noCode: No code received. Please retry the upload.

Receive.title: Receive a file
Receive.description: Enter the code shared by the sender.

ReceiveCode.title: File(s) available
ReceiveCode.subtitle: Code {code}
ReceiveCode.notFound: This code does not exist or has expired.
ReceiveCode.error: Could not fetch the file. Please retry.

HowItWorks.title: Three steps, zero friction.
HowItWorks.step1Body: Drag your files into Flick. We handle the encrypted upload.
HowItWorks.step2Body: A short code is generated. Copy it, say it, send it in a message.
HowItWorks.step3Body: The recipient enters the code and grabs the file in one click.

CallToAction.title: Create an account for more
CallToAction.body: Groups, history, recurring shares and advanced control.
